overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a mountain trail during a stormy night. The character traverses a scenic route passing stone walls and approaching a lakeside with dramatic lightning-lit clouds overhead.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the mountain valley with swords on his back

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain face forming the dramatic valley backdrop
dense pine trees covering the left hillside
dense pine trees covering the right hillside
narrow winding dirt trail through the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a wide mountain valley at night. The scene is dominated by a massive cliff face ahead and dense coniferous forests on both sides, with storm clouds partially obscuring the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with stone boundary wall

events.description: weathered stone wall appears on the right side of the path, followed by wooden fence posts

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path passing a low stone wall and rustic wooden fence on the right

entered.detail: old weathered stone wall running alongside the path
rustic wooden fence posts beyond the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the valley as a stone wall and wooden fence appear on the right, marking a boundary. The mountain cliff face shifts to the left as the camera progresses along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside mountain trail with storm overhead

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds revealing the lake below in the valley

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront as lightning strikes illuminate the valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: calm lake surface visible through the trees in the valley below
dark turbulent storm clouds with visible lightning strikes

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a lake in the valley below on the left as dramatic lightning flashes illuminate the storm clouds overhead. The stone wall and fence pass out of view behind the camera as the mountain cliff face shifts to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a confined valley path into an expansive lakeside vista under a storm. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt path flanked by dense coniferous forests, moving toward a massive cliff face that looms ahead beneath heavy storm clouds. As the camera progresses, the terrain shifts to include a stone wall and wooden fence on the right, while the cliff face gradually migrates toward the left side of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a lake in the valley below on the left, just as dramatic flashes of lightning illuminate the overhead clouds. Finally, the stone boundary disappears behind the camera as the mountain cliff shifts to the right, completing the transition into the open landscape.
